posts.author: KyleDanielle (Kyle Seem)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Is there a way to disable the autofill feature? For example, we have a board with dozens of contacts, some of whom do not have documented email addresses. Clicking into an item’s empty email cell allows the user to populate email addresses that are already loaded into the table. This is potentially very dangerous if an email address is wrongly assigned and an automation kicks in. I have autofill turned off in my browser and I can’t seem to find this option in the monday settings.

Thanks!
